column2: Description

To remove shift selection option on booking form; it will set the booking time from 00:00 to 23:59. When enabled, hides time components in Team Calendar (day/week view) and Preferences (day-wise section, right-pane form, shift dropdowns) to avoid confusion in single-shift environments.
To make dynamic field mandatory.
To enable field for entering registration number while selecting parking slots in booking form.
To enable Auto registration process.
This controls checkin from defined geo fence limit from office.
If cutoffTimeForSkipWISAppFeedback is set to 720 (hours ~ 30 days), the internal app feedback will appear once in 30 days (720 hours) after every booking creation.
Cutt off for contactless signin for Bus solution.
This property controls whether Safe Reach notifications are sent to the reporting manager.
This property controls the list of email IDs to be CCâ€™d in Safe Reach communications.
This property controls the email subject template used when Safe Reach confirmation is manually completed.
This property controls the email subject template used when Safe Reach drop verification fails.
This property controls whether email is triggered when drop verification is manually marked successful.
This property controls whether email is triggered when drop verification fails.
This property controls the default type of Work From Home booking.
This property controls the cutoff time in minutes for allowing WFH clock-in.
This property enables seat booking v2.
This property controls whether parking reminder emails are enabled.
This property controls whether the meeting rooms widget is displayed in the employee home page on web.
This property controls whether the office name is displayed along with its timezone.
This property controls the cache duration in hours for Aarogya Setu user status (covid feature).
This property controls the buffer time in seconds applied to Aarogya Setu user validation (covid feature).
This property controls whether employees are allowed to book any seat assigned to their parent hierarchy.
